name: Indonesian Peanut Sauce-Corrected
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, gradually heat the peanut butter over low heat, stirring constantly.
2. Add the minced garlic and cayenne pepper to the pan.
3. Gradually incorporate 1/2 cup water and coconut milk, continuing to stir.
4. Cook over low heat until the flavors of the sauce blend together.
5. Taste the sauce and adjust seasonings as needed.
Serving size: 1/2 tablespoon
Calories: 83
Exchange: 1/2 vegetable; 1 1/2 fat
Source: Vilma Liacouras Chantiles, Diabetic Cooking from Around the World
